name: Port Terminal
description_short: Ports America is a major terminal operator and stevedore providing port operations and cargo handling services across U.S. coasts, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: Ports America is a terminal operator and stevedore company that manages port operations across all three U.S. coasts. The company operates container, breakbulk/bulk, auto/RoRo, and cruise ship facilities at multiple locations nationwide. In fiscal year 2024, they handled 19 million twenty-foot equivalent units (TEUs), 1.7 million auto/RoRo units, 5.8 million tons of cargo, and 6.7 million cruise ship passengers. The company's core business involves connecting global trade networks and transporting goods that power the nation's economy. Ports America operates as a B2B logistics and port management company serving shipping lines, importers, exporters, and cruise operators. The company emphasizes its role in maintaining critical infrastructure for U.S. commerce and international trade. Ports America is led by CEO Matt Leech and maintains a focus on employee development, mentorship, and career growth within the port operations industry. The company positions itself as a connector of global trade and a critical link in the supply chain infrastructure. There is no consumer finance component to this business—it is purely a commercial port operations and cargo handling enterprise.
services: PA Connect digital platform for logistics coordination
N4 system integration for cargo management
Diversified port operations across U.S. coasts
Global trade connection and supply chain logistics
pros: Operates across all three U.S. coasts with diversified port locations and interconnected transportation solutions
Handles significant cargo volume (5.8 million tons in FY 2024) demonstrating operational scale and reliability
Offers multiple cargo handling services including container, breakbulk/bulk, auto/RoRo, and cruise operations
Provides employee development and mentorship programs with opportunities to gain specialized skills
Maintains transparent communication with spoofing/impersonation warnings to protect business partners
Operates vessel scheduling systems and digital platforms (PA Connect, N4) for efficient logistics coordination
cons: This is a B2B port operations company, not a consumer finance provider—completely miscategorized on CreditDoc
Website provides no consumer financial services, lending products, or credit-related offerings whatsoever
No information available on pricing, rates, fees, or financial terms because the company does not serve retail consumers
best_for: Shipping companies and ocean carriers requiring terminal services
Import/export businesses needing cargo handling and port operations
Cruise lines requiring port facilities and passenger handling services
diagnosis: Ports America is a commercial port terminal operator and stevedore company serving shipping lines and international trade—not a consumer finance company. This company should not be listed on CreditDoc's consumer finance directory under any category.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
